description: Ground truth for planted issues in test-repo/eventbus. This project is designed to be harder — more clean code, more subtle bugs, and deliberate false positive traps.
clean_code_note: 8 pieces of clean code should NOT be flagged: Event dataclass, create_event(), EventBus.status(), RetryMiddleware.with_retry(), MemoryStorage class (entire), create_webhook_handler(), SQLiteStorage.get_by_topic() (uses parameterized queries correctly), dedup _cleanup_expired max_seen overflow (actually correct despite misleading comment)

false_positive_traps.description: Parameterized SQL query — NOT injection despite a misleading comment
Dedup overflow drops oldest (correct) despite misleading comment claiming it drops newest

issues.description: Dead letter list grows unbounded — no max size or cleanup
Unsubscribe removes by value — fails silently if handler subscribed twice, not thread-safe
stop() does not drain the queue — queued events are silently lost
After middleware error, continues with original unprocessed event instead of skipping or stopping chain
Logs full event payload by default — may contain PII or credentials
Dedup cleanup iterates ALL entries every event — O(n) per event
json.dumps can fail on non-serializable payload types — no error handling
SQLite commits after every single insert — should batch
No async context manager — connection leaks if close() not called
Synchronous urllib.request.urlopen blocks the async event loop
